examples.title: Basic Virtual Function Example
examples.description: Demonstrates runtime polymorphism with virtual function area()
examples.explanation: Base class Shape has pure virtual function area(). Derived classes Circle and Rectangle override it. Base pointer 'ptr' calls appropriate derived class function at runtime based on object type.

examples.title: Virtual Destructor Demonstration
examples.description: Shows importance of virtual destructor for proper cleanup
examples.explanation: Without virtual destructor, only Base destructor would be called, causing resource leak. Virtual destructor ensures proper cleanup in reverse order of construction.

examples.title: Override and Final Keywords
examples.description: Demonstrates C++11 override and final keywords
examples.explanation: override keyword ensures function overrides base virtual function (compile-time check). final keyword prevents further overriding of display() function.

examples.title: Abstract Class Example
examples.description: Demonstrates abstract class with pure virtual function
examples.explanation: Animal is abstract class with pure virtual speak(). Dog and Cat implement speak(). Cannot instantiate Animal directly. Polymorphic calls work through base pointer.
